import React from 'react' import c from './mainReport.module.scss' import { Icons } from '../../assets/icons' import { API } from '../../api' const ClientsReport = () => { const dailyReport = { clients: 0, expenses: 0 } React.useEffect(() => { API.getDailyExpenses() .then(res => setDailyReport({ clients: dailyReport.clients, expenses: res.data })) }, []) return (
